analyst_briefing: Domain scores lack active baselines; recommend defence=3 (SAFE €150bn + EDF Ukraine structural advances, Confirmed EEAS), energy=2 (30% storage + Russian LNG growth, ECFR structural), tech=2 (China 80% rare earths), trade/diplomatic=3 (neutral). Russian hybrid posture escalates with AI in 27% FIMI (continuation of electoral targeting 6+8 MS), confirmed EEAS structural pattern with Council sanctions to Oct 2026. US doctrine shift withdraws counter-FIMI support, degrading G7/NATO architecture (HRVP Kallas). China rare earth dominance latent coercion vector. Cross-flags: WDM/FCW/AGM HIGH (Russian AI-FIMI elections), SCEM/GMM MEDIUM (Ukraine defence link, energy vuln). No contested findings; all sources Tier 1 verified. Monitor Russian TTP evolution and US retrenchment trajectory.
